name: Stephen Hawking
reason: for his contributions to our understanding of the universe, including the theory of black hole radiation

name: Emmanuelle Charpentier / Jennifer Doudna
reason: for deciphering and repurposing the bacterial CRISPR/Cas9 immune system for genome editing

name: Vladimir Arnold
reason: for his profound contributions to dynamical systems, differential equations, and singularity theory

name: Shing-Tung Yau
reason: for his work in geometric analysis that has profoundly shaped modern mathematics

name: Chuan He
reason: for pioneering discoveries in reversible RNA methylation and its roles in gene expression

name: Paul McCartney
reason: for his enduring impact on music and popular culture as one of the most influential songwriters of all time

name: Giorgio Parisi
reason: for groundbreaking discoveries in disordered systems and the physics of complex systems

name: Anton Zeilinger
reason: for fundamental contributions to quantum physics, particularly quantum entanglement and teleportation

name: Roger W. Sperry
reason: for his discoveries concerning the functional specialization of the cerebral hemispheres

name: Charles Fefferman / Richard Schoen
reason: for their contributions to analysis and geometric analysis

name: James Eisenstein / Jainendra Jain / Mordehai Heiblum
reason: for advancing our understanding of two-dimensional electron systems in strong magnetic fields

name: Jonathan Jones / Jeffery Dangl / Brian Staskawicz
reason: for groundbreaking discoveries of the immune system and disease resistance in plants
